languages.text: На полупрозрачных лицах эльдаров застыли презрительные усмешки, вызывающие желание стереть их самым грубым образом.
Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.
languages.original_text: На полупрозрачных лицах эльдаров застыли презрительные усмешки, вызывающие желание стереть их самым грубым образом.

traits.locale_text: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.
Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.
Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.

languages.text: Una mueca de desdén queda inmortalizada en los rostros translúcidos de los Aeldari, despertando un ansia de borrársela de forma brutal.
languages.original_text: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.

traits.locale_text: Una mueca de desdén queda inmortalizada en los rostros translúcidos de los Aeldari, despertando un ansia de borrársela de forma brutal.

languages.text: 艾达灵族那半透明的面孔上凝固着轻蔑的冷笑，让人恨不得用最粗暴的方式把它们彻底消灭。
languages.original_text: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.

traits.locale_text: 艾达灵族那半透明的面孔上凝固着轻蔑的冷笑，让人恨不得用最粗暴的方式把它们彻底消灭。

languages.text: Des rictus méprisants sont plaqués sur les visages translucides des Aeldari, donnant au spectateur une envie irrépressible de leur faire ravaler leur arrogance de la manière la plus brutale qui soit.
languages.original_text: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.

traits.locale_text: Des rictus méprisants sont plaqués sur les visages translucides des Aeldari, donnant au spectateur une envie irrépressible de leur faire ravaler leur arrogance de la manière la plus brutale qui soit.

languages.text: Yarı saydam Aeldari yüzlerinde donup kalmış olan küçümseyici gülüşler, onları acımasız bir şekilde silip atma dürtüsü uyandırıyor.
languages.original_text: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.

traits.locale_text: Yarı saydam Aeldari yüzlerinde donup kalmış olan küçümseyici gülüşler, onları acımasız bir şekilde silip atma dürtüsü uyandırıyor.

languages.text: アエルダリの半透明な顔には、蔑むような嘲笑が凍りついている。それを最も残酷な方法で拭い去りたい衝動が湧いてくる。
languages.original_text: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.

traits.locale_text: アエルダリの半透明な顔には、蔑むような嘲笑が凍りついている。それを最も残酷な方法で拭い去りたい衝動が湧いてくる。

languages.text: Das herablassende Grinsen auf den Gesichtern der durchscheinenden Aeldari weckt in dir den Drang, sie auf brutalste Weise zu vernichten.
languages.original_text: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.

traits.locale_text: Das herablassende Grinsen auf den Gesichtern der durchscheinenden Aeldari weckt in dir den Drang, sie auf brutalste Weise zu vernichten.
